body_txt: A character who is really good at locating places and objects. This character knows their way around maps and is good at giving directions. If they are part of a Five-Man Band or a Command Roster , expect this character to double as The Smart Guy . This type of character is often found in works with a military or maritime setting. If the setting is magical or an Eldritch Location , expect The Navigator to wield a Magic Map or compass . Their ability to navigate and detect might even be due to magic or a superpower in these settings. May often be teamed up with the Ace Pilot . Contrast with No Sense of Direction , a character who is incredibly bad at maps and directions. Not to be confused with the Buster Keaton film The Navigator (1924) .
